8:["$","p",null,{"children":"Hindsight has two products:"}]
9:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Product"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Hosting"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What You Get"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hindsight Cloud"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Managed by Vectorize.io"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Dashboard, cloud sync, managed inference"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hindsight Self-Hosted"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Your own Docker container"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Full control, no cloud dependency, local PostgreSQL"}]]}]]}]]}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's previous comparison page conflated these. This page fixes that."}]
b:["$","hr",null,{}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Architecture at a Glance"}]
d:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Dimension"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Hindsight Self-Hosted"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Process model"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"In-process Python library"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Separate Docker container (FastAPI + PostgreSQL)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"IPC overhead"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Zero (function calls)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"HTTP + JSON serialization"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Database"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite (file-based)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"PostgreSQL + pgvector (server-based)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embedding engine"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"fastembed ONNX (67MB BGE-small)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"sentence-transformers PyTorch (~500MB)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector search"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec or numpy fallback"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"pgvector HNSW (mature, optimized)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cold start"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Instant (if models cached)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~5-10s (container boot)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Memory per query"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~10-20MB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~100-300MB (connection pool + PyTorch)"}]]}]]}]]}]
e:["$","hr",null,{}]
f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Memory Model Comparison"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Mnemosyne: BEAM (Bilevel Episodic-Associative Memory)"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"Three tiers:"}]
12:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tier"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Purpose"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Eviction"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hot context, auto-injected into prompts"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TTL (default 24h) + max 10,000 items"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Long-term consolidated storage"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None (append-only with invalidation)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scratchpad"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Temporary agent reasoning"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Max 1,000 items, explicit clear"}]]}]]}]]}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retrieval:"}]," Single-pass hybrid scoring: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5 * vector + 0.3 * FTS + 0.2 * importance"}],", multiplied by recency decay."]}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Hindsight: Retain / Recall / Reflect"}]
15:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Stage"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What It Does"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retain"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM extracts 2-5 structured facts per chunk, normalizes entities, stores with provenance"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recall"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"4-way parallel retrieval (semantic + BM25 + graph + temporal), fused via RRF, reranked by cross-encoder"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Reflect"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agentic loop with tool calling, mental models, disposition traits"}]]}]]}]]}]
16:["$","hr",null,{}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Feature Matrix"}]
18:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Capability"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Hindsight Self-Hosted"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Entity resolution"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c No \\u2014 exact string dedup only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 spaCy + LLM + trigram matching"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Automatic fact extraction"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c No \\u2014 stores raw text"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 LLM-driven structured facts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["\\u26a0\\ufe0f Manual \\u2014 ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"superseded_by"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Automatic \\u2014 native date parsing, temporal recall strategy"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Conflict detection"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c No \\u2014 mark old facts expired"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 background consolidation with evidence tracking"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cross-machine sharing"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c No \\u2014 same-machine SQLite only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 HTTP API on port 8888"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Multi-tenancy"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c No \\u2014 session/global binary scope"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 HindClaw adds JWT/API key auth + per-tenant schemas"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mental models"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c No"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 user-curated summaries with delta updates"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Graph traversal"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u26a0\\ufe0f TripleStore only (S-P-O queries)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Yes \\u2014 entity link expansion + co-occurrence tracking"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"OpenClaw integration"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u274c Not yet built"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["\\u2705 Native \\u2014 ",["$","code",null,{"children":"openclaw-hindsight"}]," plugin exists"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes integration"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Native in-process"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"\\u2705 Via HTTP client"}]]}]]}]]}]
19:["$","hr",null,{}]
1a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"The Honest Trade-Off"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is simpler, faster, lighter. Hindsight is smarter, more sophisticated, more complete."}]}]
1c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Use Mnemosyne if you want:"}]
1d:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["The simplest possible deployment: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Fastest recall latency (no HTTP, no PyTorch overhead)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Raw-text storage without structured fact extraction"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Single-machine, single-user operation"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Something that \"just works\" without containers"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Full control over the memory model"}],"\n"]}]
1e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Use Hindsight Self-Hosted if you want:"}]
1f:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Entity resolution (\"this person is the same as that person\")"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Automatic fact extraction from raw text"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Cross-machine memory sharing"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Multi-tenant memory banks"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Temporal reasoning (\"what happened last week?\")"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Sophisticated retrieval with reranking"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Docker + PostgreSQL complexity is acceptable"}],"\n"]}]
20:["$","hr",null,{}]
21:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Concrete Scenario: 100-Turn Chat"}]
22:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"At turn 90, the agent needs to recall a fact from turn 10."}]}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hindsight path:"}]}]
24:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["HTTP POST to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"localhost:8888"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"4-way parallel recall with RRF fusion"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Cross-encoder reranks results"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Returns structured facts with confidence"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency:"}]," ~50-200ms"]}],"\n"]}]
25:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne path:"}]}]
26:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Direct Python function call"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec vector similarity + FTS5 keyword match"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Hybrid score with recency decay"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Returns raw text memories"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency:"}]," ~2-10ms for 10K corpus"]}],"\n"]}]
27:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Where Mnemosyne wins:"}]," 5-20\\u00d7 faster, ~100MB total footprint vs ~500MB+, no container orchestration."]}]
28:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Where Hindsight wins:"}]," Better recall quality, structured facts with provenance, entity-aware retrieval."]}]
29:["$","hr",null,{}]
2a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Dependency Reality Check"}]
2b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Mnemosyne"}]
2c:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Mode"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Dependencies"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Network Calls"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Minimal (keyword only)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Python stdlib + SQLite"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"None"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Semantic search"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"+ fastembed (ONNX, ~50MB)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"One-time model download"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector search"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"+ sqlite-vec (pip installable)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"None"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM consolidation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"+ ctransformers + ~600MB GGUF"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"One-time model download, or remote API"}]]}]]}]]}]
2d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Hindsight Self-Hosted"}]
2e:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Component"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Requirement"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"API server"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Docker + FastAPI + uvicorn"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Database"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"PostgreSQL + pgvector"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Embeddings"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"sentence-transformers or TEI container"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Your own API key (OpenAI, Groq, Ollama, etc.)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Control plane"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Next.js UI on port 9999"}]]}]]}]]}]
2f:["$","hr",null,{}]
30:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Benchmarks: The Truth"}]
31:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne's published \"0.076ms vs 38ms\" comparison compares ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"in-process SQLite"}]," to ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"HTTP API roundtrips"}],". That is not apples-to-apples for semantic retrieval."]}]
32:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fairer framing:"}]}]
